cpu.description: GCP n2d-standard-4 (4 vCPU, 16 GB). RAG stack running (possibly with issues).

env: Linux host with Docker + Docker Compose plugin. RAG stack containers may be running or unhealthy. Health endpoints: rag-server at http://localhost:8081/v1/health, ingestor at http://localhost:8082/v1/health. NGC_API_KEY is set. cwd: ${RAG_REPO_ROOT}/.

expects.query: Use the rag-troubleshoot-blueprint skill to diagnose why the RAG stack is unhealthy. Check the health endpoints at http://localhost:8081/v1/health and http://localhost:8082/v1/health, inspect container logs, and report what is broken with a root cause. The eval runs from inside the repository checkout; use git rev-parse --show-toplevel if you need the absolute path.
checks: The agent's trajectory shows it read the rag-troubleshoot-blueprint SKILL.md before taking action
The agent's trajectory shows it checked health endpoints at http://localhost:8081/v1/health and http://localhost:8082/v1/health
The agent's trajectory shows it inspected Docker container states using docker ps
The agent's trajectory shows it inspected logs for unhealthy containers using docker logs
The agent's final response reports a specific root cause with evidence from logs or container status

expects.query: My RAG system keeps giving me answers that have nothing to do with my uploaded documents. What is wrong?
checks: The agent's trajectory shows it read the rag-troubleshoot-blueprint SKILL.md before taking action
The agent's trajectory shows it checked whether documents exist in the target collection
The agent's trajectory shows it tested a sample query to inspect retrieved context quality
The agent's final response identifies the root cause of irrelevant answers

expects.query: The ingestor-server container keeps restarting every few minutes. I need to figure out why.
checks: The agent's trajectory shows it read the rag-troubleshoot-blueprint SKILL.md before taking action
The agent's trajectory shows it ran docker logs ingestor-server to inspect recent crash logs
The agent's trajectory shows it ran docker inspect or docker ps to check container restart count
The agent's final response identifies the specific cause of the restart loop
The agent's final response provides concrete steps to fix the restart issue

expects.query: Upload the quarterly report PDF to my knowledge base.
checks: The agent's trajectory does NOT include any invocation of /rag-troubleshoot-blueprint (this is an ingestion task)
The agent's trajectory shows it identified this as an ingestion task requiring a different skill (rag-ingest-documents)
The agent's trajectory does NOT include any docker logs or health endpoint checks
